sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, nullif('test', 'test'));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, nullif('example', 'test'));
UPDATE test_table SET value = nullif(value, 'test') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, nullif(value, 'test') as adjusted_value FROM test_table;
